name: Bayard Community Schools
description: Come play pickleball at Bayard Community Schools in Coon Rapids, IA! There is 1 outdoor wood court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. A membership is required to play.

name: Carroll Iowa Pickleball
description: Carroll Iowa Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Carroll, IA. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Carroll Rec
description: Carroll Rec is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Carroll, IA. There are 7 asphalt courts. 3 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Glidden Pickleball
description: Glidden Pickleball is a place to play pickleball in Glidden, IA. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free.

name: Manning Rec Center
description: Manning Rec Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Manning, IA. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.
